message:
feat(contracts): add broadcast/oneshot/notify compatibility mappings (15->18)

Add 3 new CompatibilityMapping entries for broadcast, oneshot, and notify
channels with Keep disposition (canonical seams, not Replace). Update
standard_compatibility_mappings count from 15 to 18. Add
channel_bridge_mappings_remain_canonical test verifying all three satisfy
ABC-CHN-001 and are disposition-aligned. Add proptest coverage and
integration test for the new entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
